title: Rename device - Rename, emojis not allowed
scenario: Device name should not accept emojis when renaming via Device Settings > General, and Done button should be disabled
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Tap on the desired Poly Bluetooth device to access Device Settings.
5. Tap on the device name field to edit it.
6. Enter one or more emoji characters (e.g., 😀, 🎧) into the device name field.
7. Observe the state of the 'Done' button (or equivalent save/confirm button).
8. Attempt to save the name by tapping 'Done' (if enabled).
9. Return to the Home screen and check the displayed device name.
expected: The 'Done' button should be disabled when emojis are entered in the device name field. The device name should not be changed. On the Home screen, the device name should remain unchanged (the original name before editing).
